TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_titic, title = titic, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/titic} }

S.FORM: titic榕樹 kakiliman u titic tu titic nu kilang mulangaway a kilang nu titicn tu titicay a mulangaway nu kilang. adidi ku papah nu titic nudumaan a nganga nu ngangan sa u titic hananay, singanga satu "Ficus microcarpa" baliyus. baliyus nu titicay, taypiyang tu nu akudiay a liyut nu nganga. sinkay hucukay, panganga "titicsin". nilacul
S.PHON: titiʦ** kakir~ɾiman u titiʦ tu titiʦ nu kir~ɾaŋ mur~ɾaŋawaj a kir~ɾaŋ nu titiʦn tu titiʦaj a mur~ɾaŋawaj nu kir~ɾaŋ. adidi ku papaħ nu titiʦ nudumaan a ŋaŋa nu ŋaŋan sa u titiʦ ħananaj, siŋaŋa satu "fiʦus miʦroʦarpa" bar~ɾijus. bar~ɾijus nu titiʦaj, tajpijaŋ tu nu akudiaj a r~ɾijut nu ŋaŋa. sinkaj ħuʦukaj, paŋaŋa "titiʦsin". nir~ɾaʦur~ɾ
S.FORM: titic榕樹 kakiliman u titic tu titic nu kilang mulangaway a kilang nu titicn tu titicay a mulangaway nu kilang. adidi ku papah nu titic nudumaan a nganga nu ngangan sa u titic hananay, singanga satu "Ficus microcarpa" baliyus. baliyus nu titicay, taypiyang tu nu akudiay a liyut nu nganga. sinkay hucukay, panganga "titicsin". nilacul
S.PHON: titiʦ** kakir~ɾiman u titiʦ tu titiʦ nu kir~ɾaŋ mur~ɾaŋawaj a kir~ɾaŋ nu titiʦn tu titiʦaj a mur~ɾaŋawaj nu kir~ɾaŋ. adidi ku papaħ nu titiʦ nudumaan a ŋaŋa nu ŋaŋan sa u titiʦ ħananaj, siŋaŋa satu "fiʦus miʦroʦarpa" bar~ɾijus. bar~ɾijus nu titiʦaj, tajpijaŋ tu nu akudiaj a r~ɾijut nu ŋaŋa. sinkaj ħuʦukaj, paŋaŋa "titiʦsin". nir~ɾaʦur~ɾ
